content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Restoring Three Numbers". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1154/A
constraints: The sum of any two of a, b, c, or d is unique
content.inputFormat: Four integers a, b, c, and d on a single line
content.outputFormat: Three integers on a single line, representing the original three numbers

solution.approach: Sort the four numbers and then try all possible combinations of three numbers to find the correct order

code.Python3:
a, b, c, d = map(int, input().split())
arr = [a, b, c, d]
arr.sort()
print(arr[0], arr[1], arr[2])
